description_long: This object is a small doll head with a pale lavender face and exaggerated facial features, including large, round, bright red eyes and pronounced red lips. The hair is sculpted in thick, wavy strands and painted a yellowish blonde, framing the face and extending to the sides and back. The facial expression is wide-eyed and slightly unsettling, with no visible eyebrows and a fixed, open-mouthed look. The back of the head is smooth and rounded, with the hair texture continuing around the sides. The object appears to be made from a solid, matte material, likely painted ceramic or polymer clay, with no visible seams or joints. There are no visible clothing elements or accessories attached to the head.
description: A small, pale lavender doll head with yellowish blonde sculpted hair, bright red eyes, and pronounced red lips.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, red eyes, red lips, and yellowish blonde hair framing the face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the face, the protruding nose and lips, and the layered hair texture.
description_view_2: Rear view showing mostly the back of the head and hair, with minimal facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the face and the sculpted hair, with lips and nose visible.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; only the head and hair are present.
attribute_pose: The object depicts only a head, with no visible body, arms, or legs.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide-eyed, open-mouthed expression with fixed, round red eyes and slightly parted red lips.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, wavy yellowish blonde hair sculpted in thick strands, framing the face.
